comments.body:
LGTM
I think @Luap99 was holding for the right branch, I'll let him cancel the hold if he's satisfied.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *ashley-cui*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v4.6/OWNERS)~~ [ashley-cui,vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
